title: TUI overlay handle_key uses unwrap on Option that was just checked
description:
## Severity
Trivial
## Dimension
kiss
## Location
src/tui/app.rs:659-664
## Violation
Overlay dispatch uses is_some() then as_mut().unwrap() leaving an unwrap with no protection against future refactors:

```rust
if self.overlay.is_some() {
    let action = match self.overlay.as_mut().unwrap() {
        ActiveOverlay::Help(o) => o.handle_key(key),
        ActiveOverlay::LogSelector(o) => o.handle_key(key),
    };
```

If a refactor adds a self.overlay = None step between, the unwrap panics.

## Mandated refactor
Use if-let to bind &mut once:

```rust
if let Some(overlay) = self.overlay.as_mut() {
    let action = match overlay { ... };
    ...
}
```

## Filed from QA review dispatch
